SIEGFRIEDSABER-LINDEN_LEAF.title: Linden Leaf
SIEGFRIEDSABER-LINDEN_LEAF.description: #At the start of each combat, gain 2 Dragon Scales. The first attack that reaches you each turn ignores them. When a reduced attack still deals 1 or more damage, gain 5 NP Charge (up to 3 times per turn).
SIEGFRIEDSABER-LINDEN_LEAF.flavor: A single leaf clung to his back as he bathed in the dragon's blood. One palm of skin the blood never touched — and a hero's only death.
